Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('cartografia_elche/viario.geojson', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
results = [f['properties'] for f in data['features'] if 'llano' in \(f['properties'].get\('nomvia',''\) + f['properties'].get\('nomcalle',''\)\).lower\(\) or 'sant jos' in \(f['properties'].get\('nomvia',''\) + f['properties'].get\('nomcalle',''\)\).lower\(\) or 'san jos' in \(f['properties'].get\('nomvia',''\) + f['properties'].get\('nomcalle',''\)\).lower\(\)]
for r in results:
    print\(r['nomvia'], '|', r['nomcalle'], '| kcalle:', r['kcalle'], '| tipo:', r['tipcalle']\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('cartografia_elche/ndpu.geojson', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
from collections import defaultdict
groups = defaultdict\(list\)
for f in data['features']:
    p = f['properties']
    if p.get\('cod_calle'\) in {2765, 2766, 2767, 10584}:
        try: n = int\(str\(p['num_poli']\).replace\('A',''\).replace\('B',''\)\)
        except: n = 0
        groups[p['cod_calle']].append\(n\)
labels = {2765: 'p1 \(kcalle 2765\)', 2766: 'p2 \(kcalle 2766\)', 2767: 'p3 \(kcalle 2767\)', 10584: 'sin sufijo \(kcalle 10584\)'}
for k, nums in sorted\(groups.items\(\)\):
    nums = [x for x in nums if x]
    print\(f'Llano de San José - {labels[k]}: {min\(nums\)}–{max\(nums\)} \({len\(nums\)} números\)'\)
" 2>&1)

import json
with open\('cartografia_elche/partidas_rurales.geojson', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
print\('Total partidas:', len\(data['features']\)\)
print\('Campos:', list\(data['features'][0]['properties'].keys\(\)\)\)
print\(\)
for f in data['features']:
    name = f['properties'].get\('nompartida'\) or f['properties'].get\('nomvia'\) or str\(f['properties']\)
    print\(name[:60]\)
" 2>&1 | head -50)

import json
with open\('cartografia_elche/nucleos_poblacion.geojson', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
print\('Total:', len\(data['features']\)\)
print\('Campos:', list\(data['features'][0]['properties'].keys\(\)\)\)
for f in data['features']:
    p = f['properties']
    name = p.get\('entsingul'\) or p.get\('nombre'\) or p.get\('nompartida'\) or str\(list\(p.values\(\)\)[:3]\)
    print\(name[:60]\)
" 2>&1)
